features: Nivea Fresh Pure Women's Deo Spray 0% Aluminium, 150 ml, Pack of 6
With a refreshing scent of jasmine.
Nivea Fresh Pure Deodorant Spray envelops you with a natural and delicious scent of jasmine for 48 hours.
They are guaranteed to protect against body odour, so you can feel fresh all day long.
Nivea Fresh Pure deodorant spray is aluminium free (ACH).
description: Product description Nivea Ladies Deodorant Spray - Fresh Pure - 0% Aluminium - 150ml With a refreshing scent of jasmine. Nivea Fresh Pure Deodorant Spray envelops you with a natural and delicious scent of jasmine for 48 hours. They are guaranteed to protect against body odour, so you can feel fresh all day long. Nivea Fresh Pure deodorant spray is aluminium-free (ACH). Directions Track and dry the forearms before applying. Spray a thin, even layer of deodorant on the forearms. Allow the deodorant to dry completely before putting on clothes. Re-application as needed during the day or after physical activity for continuous protection.
